series_metadata.series_description: Files concerning programs, initiatives, or special projects which lead to the development of new materials or programs for or provided by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO). Records include, but are not limited to, correspondence, research, work products, agendas, meeting summaries, memos, and final product, recommendation, or outcome.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from completion or termination of program/project. ; Paper: from completion or termination of program/project. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
